title: Craftingg
description: Add new crafting recipes and items to Minecraft 1.20.x - 26.x

## 🧩 Craftingg – More Recipes, More Possibilities!

Craftingg is a simple yet powerful mod designed to enhance your Minecraft gameplay by introducing new crafting recipes, unique items, and additional structures. If you've ever felt constrained by the vanilla Minecraft experience, this mod expands your world with fresh creations and innovative progression paths.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🛠️ New Crafting Recipes
*   Adds a variety of new recipes to streamline and enrich progression in both early and late-game stages.
*   Unlocks novel crafting combinations inspired by survival and adventure gameplay.
*   Carefully balanced to introduce more options without disrupting the core game's equilibrium.

### 📦 New Items
*   Introduces a collection of unique, custom-designed items.
*   These items serve multiple purposes, including crafting, advanced tools, building, and survival enhancement.

---

## 🔧 Technical Details
*   **Mod Loader Compatibility:** Fabric / NeoForge / Forge / Quilt
*   **Minecraft Versions:** 1.20.x - 26.x *(Please verify the intended Minecraft version range if this differs from your expectation)*
*   **Environment:** Compatible with both Client and Server installations.
*   **Performance:** Lightweight and optimized for all systems.

---

## 🎮 Why Choose FlexusCraft?
*   Keeps the game feeling fresh and exciting without breaking vanilla balance.
*   An excellent addition for survival world playthroughs.
*   Designed for broad compatibility with most other mods.
*   An ideal choice for inclusion in modpacks.

---

## 📥 Getting Started
1.  Install the mod.
2.  Launch your Minecraft world.
3.  Enjoy exploring Craftingg's new recipes!

---

## 📝 Future Plans
*   More unique items
*   Expanded crafting recipe collection
*   Customizable blocks
*   Additional world generation structures
*   Configurable mod options

---

## 💬 Feedback
Found a bug or have a suggestion? We'd love to hear from you!
Your feedback is invaluable in helping us improve the mod.

**[Report an Issue](https://github.com/Hosseinlang/Comment/issues)**
